Title: Raven's Home
Writer: Jed Elinoff, Michael Poryes, Susan Sherman
Actors: Raven-Symoné, Issac Ryan Brown, Sky Katz
Plot: Raven and Chelsea are now divorced single mothers raising their kids in one chaotic, fun, friend-filled family. When one of Raven's kids starts to show signs of having inherited her trait of seeing into the future, the already-hectic household gets turned upside-down, keeping even Raven on her toes.
